nasb.text: The righteousness of the blameless will smooth his way, But the wicked will fall by his own wickedness.

esv.text: The righteousness of the blameless keeps his way straight, but the wicked falls by his own wickedness.

cnv.text: 完全人的公義，必使自己的路平坦正直， 但惡人必因自己的邪惡跌倒。

ccb.text: 纯全人行义走坦途， 恶人作恶致沉沦。

csbs.text: 纯全人的公义修直自己的道路； 恶人必因自己的邪恶而仆倒。
